description: Full-stack class management system with automated CSV import, WhatsApp notifications, terms acceptance, QR code participation, and admin portal

userStories.title: Setup Next.js + Convex project structure
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to initialize the Next.js frontend and Convex backend so we have the foundation to build on.
acceptanceCriteria: Next.js 14+ app router project initialized
Convex backend initialized with convex/ directory
Tailwind CSS configured
Basic folder structure: app/, components/, lib/
Environment variables configured (.env.local with CONVEX_DEPLOYMENT)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Define Convex schema for all tables
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to define the complete database schema so all data structures are in place.
acceptanceCriteria: Create convex/schema.ts with all tables: purchases, participants, classes, sessions, terms_versions, admins, audit_logs, csv_files, attendance_records
Each table has proper field types and indexes
purchases: order_id (indexed), customer_mobile, purchase_datetime, participant_count, status, token, class_id, session_id, created_at
participants: participant_id (indexed, UUID), purchase_id, session_id, name, mobile, qr_code_data, terms_accepted_at, terms_version_id, created_at
sessions: session_id, class_id, location, date, time, quota_defined, quota_used, status, created_at
attendance_records: attendance_id, participant_id (indexed), session_id (indexed), marked_by_admin, marked_at, created_at
Convex schema validation passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create seed data for classes and sessions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need sample classes and sessions to test the flow without waiting for real data.
acceptanceCriteria: Create convex mutation to seed 2 sample classes (eg cycling class, guided tour)
Create 4 sessions across the classes with different dates and quota
Include one terms version marked as is_current=true
Seed admin account: username 'admin', role 'super_admin', password hashed
Seed admin account: username 'staff', role 'regular_admin'
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build CSV import cron job
userStories.description: As the system, I need to automatically process CSV files every minute to import purchase records.
acceptanceCriteria: Create Convex cron job that runs every 1 minute
Job checks Convex file storage for unprocessed CSV files
Parse CSV with columns: order_id, customer_mobile, purchase_datetime, participant_count
Skip if order_id already exists (log duplicate error)
Insert new purchases with status='pending_terms' and generate unique token (UUID)
Mark CSV file as processed in csv_files table
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build Twilio WhatsApp helper
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a reusable Twilio integration to send WhatsApp messages.
acceptanceCriteria: Create lib/twilio.ts with sendWhatsApp function
Function accepts: to (phone), message (text)
Store Twilio credentials in Convex environment variables (TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER)
Handle errors gracefully and return success boolean
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Send purchase confirmation WhatsApp
userStories.description: As a customer, I want to receive a WhatsApp message immediately after purchase import with a terms acceptance link.
acceptanceCriteria: Create Convex action triggered after purchase insert
Generate terms link: https://[domain]/terms?token=[uuid]
Send WhatsApp via Twilio: 'Your purchase is confirmed! Please accept terms: [link]'
Update purchase status to 'confirmation_sent'
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build terms acceptance form page
userStories.description: As a customer, I want to view and accept terms via a simple form without logging in.
acceptanceCriteria: Create app/terms/page.tsx with URL param token
Fetch purchase details from Convex using token
Display class name, customer info
Session selector dropdown showing only sessions with available quota > 0
Display full terms content from latest is_current version
Checkbox: 'I have read and accept the terms'
Submit button disabled until session selected + checkbox checked
On submit: save session selection, terms version, timestamp, status='terms_accepted'
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Generate participants and send QR links
userStories.description: As a customer, I want to receive WhatsApp messages with unique QR code links for each participant after accepting terms.
acceptanceCriteria: After terms submission, create participant records (loop participant_count times)
Each participant gets unique participant_id (use crypto.randomUUID())
Link each participant to: purchase, selected session, terms version
Send WhatsApp with links: https://[domain]/participant/[participant_id]
If participant_count=2, send one message with both links
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build participant details page with QR code
userStories.description: As a participant, I want to view my class details and show a QR code for check-in.
acceptanceCriteria: Create app/participant/[participant_id]/page.tsx
Fetch participant, session, class details from Convex
Display: participant name, class name, session location/date/time
Generate QR code encoding participant_id (use qrcode library)
Display QR code large enough to scan from 1-2 meters
Show 'Change Session' button only if session_date - current_date > 2 days
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add session rescheduling modal
userStories.description: As a participant, I want to change my session up to 2 days before the scheduled date.
acceptanceCriteria: Create SessionChangeModal component with session dropdown
Show only sessions with same class_id and available quota > 0
On submit: update participant.session_id, decrement old session quota_used, increment new session quota_used
Show success confirmation toast
No WhatsApp notification sent (customer-initiated)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build admin login page
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to log in with username and password to access the management portal.
acceptanceCriteria: Create app/admin/login/page.tsx with form (username, password fields)
Create Convex auth action to validate credentials against admins table
Use bcrypt to verify password hash
Store admin role and username in session (use next-auth or Convex auth)
Redirect to /admin/dashboard on success
Show error message on invalid credentials
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build session participants list page
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to see all participants in a session to prepare for class.
acceptanceCriteria: Create app/admin/sessions/[session_id]/participants/page.tsx
Fetch all participants for the session from Convex
Display table with columns: participant_id, name, mobile, terms_accepted (yes/no), attendance_status
Show accepted terms version
Sort by participant name by default
Add 'Scan QR Code' button at top of page
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build QR scanner for attendance marking
userStories.description: As a regular admin, I want to scan participant QR codes using my device camera and mark attendance.
acceptanceCriteria: Create QRScanner component using html5-qrcode or qr-scanner library
Click 'Scan QR Code' opens camera (request WebRTC permissions)
Decode QR to extract participant_id
Validate participant_id belongs to current session
If valid: create attendance_record with participant_id, session_id, marked_by_admin (from session), marked_at (timestamp)
Show success toast with participant name
If invalid session: show error toast 'Participant not registered for this session'
If already attended: show warning 'Already marked attended at [timestamp]'
Update participant row UI to show checkmark + timestamp
Log to audit_logs
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build admin class list page
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to view all classes and create new ones (Super Admin only).
acceptanceCriteria: Create app/admin/classes/page.tsx
Display table: class_id, class_name, total_sessions, status
Add 'Add Class' button (show only if user role is super_admin)
Add Class modal with fields: name, description
Create Convex mutation to insert class with audit log
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build admin session management page
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to create and manage sessions for a class.
acceptanceCriteria: Create app/admin/classes/[class_id]/sessions/page.tsx
Display table: location, date, time, quota (defined/used/available), status
Show quota as '20 / 15 / 5' (defined=20, used=15, available=5)
Add 'Add Session' button (Super Admin only)
Add Session modal: location, date, time, quota_defined fields
Create Convex mutation to insert session with audit log
If available=0, show 'Full' indicator in red
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
